data.title: Credissential signs LoI to acquire CoinCmply
data.description:
• Credissential (OTCPK:IPTNF) said on Friday that it has signed a non-binding letter of intent to acquire CoinCmply, a private company specializing in cryptocurrency tax compliance solutions for Canadian and United States crypto users.
  • CoinCmply is a platform designed to assist cryptocurrency users in managing and simplifying their tax obligations.
  • Under the terms of the LOI, at closing of the transaction, the company will issue an aggregate of 13.6M common shares in the company at a deemed price of $0.08 per consideration share to the shareholders of CoinCmply pro rata to their respective shareholdings in CoinCmply.
  • The proposed transaction is considered arm’s length. The company does not expect to assume any long-term debt in connection with the transaction.
  • This acquisition is expected to enhance Credissential's capabilities in providing AI-driven financial solutions, particularly in the areas of identity protection, credit building, budgeting, and asset optimization.

data.title: Dow futures fall sharply as DoJ's probe on UnitedHealth weighs on the index
data.description:
Stock index futures were mixed on Friday, as markets look to regain some momentum after Thursday's sell-off, which was partly driven by Walmart's disappointing outlook.

S&P 500 futures (SPX) +0.2%, Nasdaq 100 futures (US100:IND) +0.3%, and Dow futures (INDU) -0.5%.

Dow futures' tumbled, in part driven by UnitedHealth's (UNH) ~12% drop in the premarket, after The Wall Street Journal reported that the U.S. Department of Justice has launched a new investigation into the company’s business practices.

The 10-year Treasury yield (US10Y) was down 2 basis points to 4.48%. The 2-year yield (US2Y) fell 1 basis point to 4.27%.

U.S. stocks finished with losses Thursday, with the S&P 500 pulling back from a record high, in part as investors balked at Walmart's (WMT) soft financial outlook.

"We saw a moderate risk-off move yesterday, with the S&P 500 falling back from its all-time high," Deutsche Bank's Jim Reid said.

The main story in the U.S. was a weaker-than-expected forecast from Walmart, which added to nerves about the health of the consumer right now, especially after a soft retail sales print last week, Reid added.

On the economic side, the February PMI composite flash and January existing home sales are due during market hours. The latter is expected to come in at 4.13M.

The February consumer sentiment is forecasted to come in at 67.8.

"Final February U.S. Michigan consumer sentiment data is mainly of use as a source of entertainment, such is the degree of political partisanship," UBS' Paul Donovan said.

However, approval for U.S. President Donald Trump’s economic policies and Trump mega-donor Musk has been falling, and the Michigan sentiment may hint at whether that disapproval is partisan or not, Donovan added.

data.title: Neurocrine Biosciences authorizes $500M share repurchase program
data.description:
• Neurocrine Biosciences (NASDAQ:NBIX) said on Friday that its board has authorized a new share repurchase program under which the company may repurchase up to $500M of its shares, subject to market conditions.
  • This new share repurchase authorization is in addition to the $300M accelerated repurchase program that was announced in October 2024 and completed in early February 2025.
  • Under the new authorization, repurchases may be made from time to time at management's discretion through a variety of methods, such as open-market transactions including pre-set trading plans, privately negotiated transactions, accelerated share repurchases, and other transactions.
  • Neurocrine Biosciences (NASDAQ:NBIX) shares were up 0.54% in pre-market trading.

data.title: Uniti Group reports mixed Q4 results; initiates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Uniti Group press release (NASDAQ:UNIT): Q4 AFFO of $0.35 beats by $0.04.
  • Revenue of $293.32M (+2.7% Y/Y) misses by $1.27M.

  • Uniti Fiber contributed $71.7 million of revenues and $31.1 million of Adjusted EBITDA for the fourth quarter of 2024, achieving Adjusted EBITDA margins of approximately 43%.

  • Uniti Leasing contributed revenues of $221.7 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $214.5 million for the fourth quarter.

  • Combined gross capital expenditures for both Uniti Fiber and Uniti Leasing were $24.3 million during the fourth quarter of 2024.

  • The Company’s consolidated outlook for 2025 is as follows (in millions):

  • Full Year 2025
    Revenue $ 1,196 to $ 1,216 vs. consensus of $1.21B
    Net income attributable to common shareholders 95 to 115
    Adjusted EBITDA (1) 966 to 986
    Interest expense, net (2) 532 to 532
    Attributable to common shareholders:
    FFO (1) 322 to 342
    AFFO (1) 369 to 389
    Weighted-average common shares outstanding – diluted 280 to 280

data.title: The9 establishes JV with Qing Cheng for mobile game operation and distribution in China
data.description:
The9 (NASDAQ:NCTY) said on Friday that its wholly-owned subsidiary Shanghai The9 Information Technology has signed a joint venture agreement with Chengdu Qing Cheng Network Science and Technology, a mobile game operation and distribution company focusing on serving gamers in China's market.

The9 will hold a 51% stake and Qing Cheng will hold a 49% stake in the joint venture. The JV will become The9's flagship subsidiary to operate and distribute mobile games in the China's market.

Qing Cheng committed that it will utilize its unique distribution channel advantages in the sinking markets to operate different mobile games for the JV.

Qing Cheng committed to The9 that the JV will have an annual profit of more than RMB80 million (approximately US$11M) in 2025, with profit increasing by at least 50% annually in 2026 and 2027.

The9 granted Qing Cheng The9 110.2M restricted shares (equivalent to 367,442 ADSs). These restricted shares will be unlocked in stages according to the actual achievement of the JV's 2025 profit as committed by Qing Cheng.

If 2025 profit guarantee is achieved, The9 will grant Qing Cheng the second batch of restricted shares according to this mechanism. If the 2026 profit guarantee is achieved, The9 will grant Qing Cheng the third batch of restricted shares according to this mechanism.
